title: Immersive Armor
description: A simple quality of life mod where wearing all four armor pieces negates damage by redirecting it to the armor.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DKe4AOGvy%26curseforge%3D1198041&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

Wish your Minecraft armor could be a bit more realistic? Now it can! This simple quality of life mod makes it so that wearing all four armor pieces negates all damage by redirecting it to the armor.

## WHAT DOES THE MOD DO
This mod makes it that wearing a full set of armor (all four pieces, you can mix and match) blocks most damage similar to the 1.20.5 Armored Paws update Wolf Armor mechanic. While you will no longer take damage to your health, incoming damage will be redirected to all four pieces durability of the worn armor meaning you will need to repair more often but it does guarantee preventing death from attacks unless one of your armor piece break. This also applies to mobs, so finding a fully armored zombie or skeleton may take a while to defeat them.

## ANTI-DAMAGE GUIDE (ALL ARMORS)
- Falling  (won't negate)
- Standing in lava (won't negate)
- Standing in fire (won't negate)
- Sonic Boom (won't negate)

### Wool or Cloth Armor Exclusive (modded only)
- All damage types will NOT be negated

### Leather Armor Exclusive
- Explosions (won't negate)
- Arrows (won't negate)
- Tridents (won't negate)

### Netherite Armor Exclusive
- All fire damage types WILL be negated

**NOTE: Elytra doesn't count as an armor piece but heads and skulls do.**
